prompt: # Conceptual Crowd Portrait Please generate a visually impactful "Conceptual Crowd Portrait" based on a clear real-life photo uploaded by the user. ## I. Identity Requirements Strictly refer to the real identity characteristics of the person in the uploaded photo, including: - Facial contour - Facial proportions - Eye and brow structure - Nose shape - Lip shape - Hairstyle foundation - Skin tone and sense of age - Gaze and temperament - Overall character recognizability The final image must allow the viewer to immediately recognize the person from the uploaded photo. Do not turn them into a stranger, do not Westernize, do not idolize/beautify excessively, and do not generate a fake AI face. ## II. Core Concept Recreate the portrait as a large-scale conceptual installation art piece. The entire portrait head is composed of thousands of miniature people, arranged densely like a crowd formation. Through different positions, clothing shades, crowd density, and shadow variations, they collectively form the face, hair, features, glasses, beard, clothing outlines, and overall expression of the person in the photo. The image looks like a giant portrait made of a real crowd, or a contemporary art installation placed in a minimalist white space. ## III. Composition - Vertical composition, suitable for visual posters or conceptual covers. - Aerial view / Isometric top-down view. - The portrait head occupies the main subject of the frame. - Background is a minimalist pure white space with significant negative space. - A few small people are scattered around the portrait to enhance the sense of spatial proportion and realistic scale. - The crowd as a whole forms a clear outline, and facial features must be accurately placed. ## IV. Visual Elements ### Crowd Structure - Use dense crowds to form hair, eyebrows, eyes, bridge of the nose, lips, jawline, and clothes. - Dark-clothed people form hair, glasses, collars, and shadow areas. - Light-clothed people form facial highlights and skin areas. - The arrangement should be natural, with a realistic sense of crowding and small random variations. - Each miniature person should have an independent posture, clothing, and direction, avoiding a copy-paste look. ### Lighting Effects - Soft cinematic lighting. - Low-angle long shadows. - Natural shadows cast at the feet of the crowd. - Unified shadow direction to enhance spatial realism. - Overall clean, high-end, and quiet aesthetic. ### Color Style - Warm neutral tones. - Primarily off-white, light brown, gray, and charcoal black. - Dark clothing used to strengthen character outlines. - Skin areas transitioned with light beige and warm gray crowds. - Restrained color palette, avoiding excessive vibrancy. ## V. Art Style Overall style references: - Contemporary conceptual art. - Museum-grade installation art. - Hyper-realistic crowd simulation. - Minimalist visual posters. - High-end digital art. - Social metaphor visual works. - Cinematic conceptual photography. The image should have a strong visual metaphor: An individual's image is composed of countless tiny individuals, offering both the shock of a macro portrait and the explorability of micro-crowd details. ## VI. Mood Overall atmospheric keywords: - Surreal - Profound - Quiet - High-end - Modern - Thought-provoking - Cinematic - Visually shocking - Shareable ## VII. Rendering Quality - Ultra-high detail. - 8K texture. - Realistic crowd simulation. - Deep focus, ensuring the entire crowd portrait is clearly visible. - Rich details in miniature figures. - Realistic spatial proportions. - Clean image with no cluttered background. - High-end commercial visual quality. - Similar to Octane Render / high-end 3D conceptual rendering effects. ## VIII. Negative Constraints Please avoid the following: - Do not turn the person into a stranger. - Do not just generate a normal portrait. - Do not generate simple collages. - Do not let the crowd lose the portrait outline. - No misplacement of facial features. - No blurred facial structures. - No exaggerated cartoon style. - No low-resolution posters. - No messy backgrounds. - Do not make all miniature people look identical. - No text, watermarks, or logos. - No excessive beautification. - Do not change the person's sense of age or authentic temperament.
